message:
You know that one friend who panics at the drop of a hat? Yeah, that’s my buddy Jake. Last week, he called me in a total fluster about a storm warning. I mean, the guy was ready to pack up and head for the hills! 

I get it—being prepared is important, but sometimes it’s all about staying calm and having a plan. We talked through what he needed in his go-bag and how to keep important documents organized. By the end, he was much more relaxed and even made a checklist with me. 

It’s funny how a little planning can turn panic into peace of mind. Have you ever had a moment like that with a friend? How do you help them stay calm?
